title: Indian Savory Semolina Crumble
description: A flavorful and crunchy Indian-inspired savory crumble made with semolina and topped with a crumbly mixture, perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together semolina, savory, and crumbly.
In a pan, heat oil and sauté onion until softened.
Add the onion mixture to the semolina mixture and mix well.
Add water to the mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth.
Shape the dough into a round shape and place it on a baking sheet.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Break the crumble into pieces and serve.
